name: Z-Quantum Omni-Swarm Mega-Entanglement Infinity Core
summary: Umbrella vision for merged Z-formulas, LPBS-flex, GGAESP-360, shadows, micro-Z, and hub spine orchestration — mapped to real engineering (workers, mirrors, audit, governance).

engineeringMap.quantumEntanglement: Synchronized state across nodes (registry, mirrors, message fan-out)
engineeringMap.superposition: Parallel workers / queued jobs with bounded concurrency
engineeringMap.annealing: Scheduling and cost minimization under governance gates
engineeringMap.swarm: Supervised mini-agents with scoped roles and rate limits
engineeringMap.shadows: Shadow pipelines that do not affect production until promoted
engineeringMap.selfReplication: Idempotent deploys and horizontal scale — not unbounded local fork bombs

lpbsFlexInfinite.role: long-progression observation ladder with clamps (no sub-zero)

ggaesp360.role: full-circle governance + emotional posture chambers (metaphor + metrics)

zPowerAZ.role: ordered composition layer (a→z) for plug-in modules

spine.superShellWhaleBus: Multi-deck service bus: user events → governance → workers
spine.quadrupleSpines: Four parallel integrity spines (safety, registry, comms, observability)
spine.octoNeuralCore: Eight-channel decision fan-in (can map to worker pools / regions)

web.notes: Primary experience is the Next route (Three.js + observation panel). Legacy HTML redirects to /z-qosmei.

observation.notes: Cap shown in the drought column; true drought may exceed cap for LPBS-style scanning. DBZ aggregate imports read only this many prefix lines for speed.

ethics.roulette: Observation and bankroll journaling only — no guaranteed outcomes; wheel size parameterized (37 / 38).
ethics.ai: Explainable summaries; hub authority outranks opaque model output where policy applies.

claimsScope.operational: Operational coherence — registries, verifiers, and green builds — is the only kind of automated prediction this hub asserts across projects.
claimsScope.observation: This panel summarizes loaded or demo history only: descriptive stats, not randomness certification, not next-spin forecasting, no guaranteed edge.
